The **2018 CS [Golden Spin of Zagreb](/wiki/Golden_Spin_of_Zagreb "Golden Spin of Zagreb")** was held in December 2018 as part of the [2018–19 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2018%E2%80%9319_ISU_Challenger_Series "2018–19 ISU Challenger Series").[[1]](#cite_note-announcement-1) Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dancing](/wiki/Ice_dancing "Ice dancing").
